c_description.description: A human friendly description of the group, for display in study builder.
c_description.label: Description

c_pi_oversight_signoff.description: Audit record capturing PI oversight signature attestation, UTC time, window, and snapshot.
c_pi_oversight_signoff.label: PI Oversight Signoff

c_required_signature.description: If Required Signature is true then user have to sign the document before review
c_required_signature.label: Required Signature

c_evaluator.label: Role of the person who provided the evaluation.

c_pi_oversight_email_interval_weeks.description: Email digest interval in weeks (1 = weekly, 2 = bi-weekly, etc.)
c_pi_oversight_email_interval_weeks.label: PI Oversight Email Interval Weeks

c_pi_oversight_enabled.description: Enables PI Oversight feature for this study
c_pi_oversight_enabled.label: PI Oversight Enabled

c_pi_oversight_overdue_grace_days.description: Grace period in days before marking review as overdue
c_pi_oversight_overdue_grace_days.label: PI Oversight Overdue Grace Days

c_pi_oversight_review_due_weeks.description: Review window in weeks (0 = never due)
c_pi_oversight_review_due_weeks.label: PI Oversight Review Due Weeks

c_visit_confirmation_anchor.description: This is the anchor date template that gets set by confirming or skipping this visit
c_visit_confirmation_anchor.label: Visit Confirmation Anchor

c_visit_flag_confirmed.description: This is the flag template that gets set by confirming this visit
c_visit_flag_confirmed.label: Visit Flag

c_visit_flag_skipped.description: This is the flag template that gets set by skipping this visit
c_visit_flag_skipped.label: Visit Flag

c_visit_start_skip_enable_anchor.description: Anchor date template that needs to be set in order for this visit to be startable or skippable
c_visit_start_skip_enable_anchor.label: Visit Start Skip Enable Anchor Date
